# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud monitoring and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# main.yaml
imports:
  - path: compute.yaml
  - path: sql.yaml
  - path: storage.yaml
  - path: loadbalancer.yaml

resources:
  - name: app-network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      autoCreateSubnetworks: false

  - name: app-subnet
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
      region: us-central1
      privateIpGoogleAccess: true

  - name: app-firewall-allow-health-check
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      sourceRanges:
        - 35.191.0.0/16
        - 130.211.0.0/22
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "80"
            - "443"

  - name: app-firewall-allow-internal
    type: compute.v1.firewall
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      sourceRanges:
        - 10.0.1.0/24
      allowed:
        - IPProtocol: tcp
        - IPProtocol: udp
        - IPProtocol: icmp

  - name: app-compute
    type: compute.yaml
    properties:
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
      subnet: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
      zone: us-central1-a

  - name: app-sql
    type: sql.yaml
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)

  - name: app-storage
    type: storage.yaml
    properties:
      location: US

  - name: app-loadbalancer
    type: loadbalancer.yaml
    properties:
      instanceGroup: $(ref.app-compute.instanceGroup)

outputs:
  - name: loadBalancerIP
    value: $(ref.app-loadbalancer.loadBalancerIP)
  - name: sqlInstanceConnection
    value: $(ref.app-sql.connectionName)
  - name: storageBucket
    value: $(ref.app-storage.bucketName)
